name: notebooklm

mif.reason: NotebookLM audio/video/slide/infographic outputs are non-text formats orthogonal to MIF markdown. The notebook is grounded in the SOURCES — the findings' actual cited primary materials are added as NotebookLM sources (plus a findings digest), never a rendered report — with provenance recorded in the manifest. The MIF Level-3 source of truth lives in the generic report channel.

description: Produce NotebookLM assets (audio deep-dive, slide deck, infographics, video, mind map) grounded in the SOURCES — the findings' actual cited primary materials are added to the notebook plus a findings digest, so NotebookLM synthesizes from source documents, never a pre-digested report.
